n1.speaker: narrator
n1.line: Julian at the counter, paying, rehearsing his public smile. He pulls coins from his coat pocket — and something small skitters across the floor to Gary's shoe. A fragment of GREEN WAX.

n2.speaker: narrator
n2.line: Gary crouches. Overlaying the seal sketch in his mind: the ivy leaves align. A soft, terrible chime somewhere behind the sternum.

n3.speaker: otto
n3.line: You look like a man who found something he was hoping not to find.

n4.speaker: narrator
n4.line: An espresso slides across the counter, quietly, on the house.
